badges.description: Recognizes students who have demonstrated sustained engagement with career readiness, professional development, and leadership through the CSUN Career Center.
badges.meaning: The Career Champion badge signifies that the recipient completed an approved CSUN Career Center experience centered on career readiness, professional growth, and active participation in career development programming.
badges.criteria: Awarded to participants who successfully completed the qualifying CSUN Career Center program, workshop series, leadership experience, or milestone designated for Career Champion recognition.

templates.title: Career Champion
templates.description: CSUN staff and faculty who earn this badge are recognized for integrating career development into their work and empowering students to succeed beyond graduation.
templates.meaning:
The CSUN Career Champions Badge is awarded to staff and faculty who have successfully completed the CSUN Career Center’s Career Champions program. Badge earners are recognized as dedicated CSUN professionals who actively integrate career development into their work with students.

Through this program, participants gain practical strategies to connect academic pathways with real-world opportunities, support student persistence, and guide students in their transition to meaningful careers. Career Champions are equipped with tools to enhance advising and student interactions—helping students build confidence in selecting majors, exploring career options, and planning for life after graduation.

Earning this badge reflects a commitment to ongoing professional growth and to fostering a campus-wide culture where career readiness is a shared responsibility among faculty and staff.
templates.criteria: To earn this badge, participants must complete the Career Champions course, including all modules, activities, and assessments.

siteConfig.heroIntro: Access the protected badge directory, verify official CSUN Career Center credentials, and issue polished e-badges with matching certificates.
siteConfig.footerNote: Official credential records are maintained by the CSUN Career Center.
